footer.tagline: A family woodworking workshop. 26+ years of tradition and custom solutions for your space.

hero.title: Handcrafted work trusted for years
hero.subtitle: Custom doors, furniture and windows from natural materials. Svitlytsya workshop — 26 years of tradition and precision.

about.title: A family workshop with 26 years of tradition
about.description: Svitlytsya Maystra is a family business founded in 1998. We specialize in manufacturing doors, furniture and windows from natural wood. Each product is an individual project with attention to every detail.

whyUs.title: Quality you can see and feel
whyUs.subtitle: We don't sell off-the-shelf solutions. Each product is designed for a specific space, and materials are selected individually.
whyUs.ownProdDesc: We control every stage without intermediaries
whyUs.consultDesc: We'll help you choose a solution for your space

process.title: Work process
process.step1Desc: We discuss your wishes, style and budget
process.step2Desc: A craftsman visits for precise room measurements
process.step3Desc: We develop a sketch and agree on materials
process.step4Desc: We manufacture the product in our own workshop

services.title: Workshop services
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to installation and warranty service.
services.doorsDesc: Entry and interior doors from solid wood for individual projects
services.furnitureDesc: Kitchens, wardrobes, shelves and other furniture from natural wood
services.windowsDesc: Wood, PVC and aluminum windows with professional installation
services.restorationDesc: Restoring old doors, windows and furniture to perfect condition

services.subtitle: Full cycle — from sketch to installation
